name: cnn_tariff
task: Open CNN and search for news about the Trump tariff policy.

name: cnn_science_headline
task: Navigate to CNN's Science section and check the top headline news. When was it published?
essential_states: The top headline news in Science section is selected

name: cnn_nvidia_save
task: Search for 'Nvidia' in CNN, open the first result, and save it to 'Your CNN'.

name: cnn_switch_to_international
task: Open CNN settings and switch the Edition to International.

name: cnn_watch_world_news
task: Go to CNN's Watch tab, view all World news, play the first video, and save it.

name: tripadvisor_tokyo_attractions
task: Open Tripadvisor and search for attractions in Tokyo.

name: tripadvisor_seoul_hotels
task: Search for hotels in Seoul on Tripadvisor for 1 room, 2 adults and 1 child, sorted by traveler rating.

name: tripadvisor_nearby_restaurants
task: Find nearby restaurants on Tripadvisor sorted by distance from current location.Then open the first restaurant and scroll down to the 'traveler insights'.What rating has its service received?

name: tripadvisor_ny_italian
task: Search for restaurants in New York on Tripadvisor with filters 'Open Now' and 'Italian cuisine', then open the first restaurant and check the reviews.

name: tripadvisor_manchester_top_activity
task: Search for "Manchester" on TripAdvisor and go to the **Things to Do** section. What is the top recommended activity?

name: amazon_wireless_headphones
task: Search for 'Wireless headphones' on Amazon and view the 'product details' of the first item.

name: amazon_laptop_sleeve
task: Open Amazon and search for 'Laptop Sleeve'. What is the price of the first result?

name: amazon_cancel_items_service
task: Go to the Menu page on Amazon and locate the 'Cancel Items or Orders' service.

name: amazon_bluetooth_prime
task: Search Amazon for 'Bluetooth headphones' and apply Prime filter. Then add the first result to cart.

name: amazon_wireless_keyboard
task: Search for 'Wireless keyboard' on Amazon and add the first product to cart.Then remove 'wired keyboard' item from the cart.

name: omio_bus_london_cambridge
task: Open Omio and search for a bus route from London to Cambridge using the recommended option today with no return.

name: omio_flight_paris_rome
task: Find the cheapest flight from Paris to Rome for 2 adults and 1 child on Omio departing tomorrow. What is the price?

name: omio_train_berlin_munich
task: Plan a train trip on Omio from Berlin to Munich for 1 adult, departing today with a 7-day return.

name: omio_ny_la_jfk
task: Search for a route from New York to Los Angeles next Friday in Omio, specifying JFK Airport as departure.

name: omio_explore_spain
task: In Omio, go to Explore tab, set starting place to Spain, select 'Beaches' and 'Nature' as preferences, and start exploring destinations.

name: bluecoins_budget_summary
task: Open Bluecoins and view the budget summary from August 1 to August 5, 2025. How much is the total expense?

name: bluecoins_record_lunch
task: Record an expense of $15 named 'Lunch' in Bluecoins.

name: bluecoins_groceries_label
task: Create an expense of $30 named 'Groceries' in Bluecoins and add the label 'Essentials' to it.

name: bluecoins_credit_card_reminder
task: Set a monthly reminder in Bluecoins named 'Credit Card Payment' with the label 'Personal', starting on the 25th of next month.

name: bluecoins_taxi_business
task: Create an expense of $50 'Equipment Rental' with label 'Business' for yesterday at 8:00 PM. Then filter expenses by label 'Business' to see all related entries.

name: tasks_sort_priority
task: Open the 'Work' list in Tasks app. Sort tasks by Priority. Which task has the highest priority?

name: tasks_mark_buy_milk
task: In the 'Shopping' list of Tasks app, locate the task 'Buy Milk' and mark it as completed.

name: tasks_add_running_list
task: Open Tasks app and add a new list named 'Running'.

name: tasks_buy_juice_note
task: Create a task 'Buy Juice' in 'Shopping' list, add note 'Check expiry date', and save it.

name: tasks_prepare_presentation
task: In 'Work' list, create task 'Prepare Presentation', add subtasks 'Draft Slides' and 'Collect Data', assign tag 'Project', and save.

name: ncalendar_gym_workout_today
task: Open N Calendar and create an event today 'Gym Workout', scheduled from 10:00 AM to 12:00 AM.

name: ncalendar_next_wednesday_event
task: In N Calendar, what event is scheduled for next Wednesday and when does it start?

name: ncalendar_team_meeting_next_thursday
task: Create a new event 'Team Meeting' for next Thursday from 8:00 AM to 9:00 AM, and make it repeat every week.

name: ncalendar_daily_standup
task: Create a new event 'Daily Standup' for next weekday starting at 9:00 AM each day.

name: ncalendar_study_finance
task: Create new event 'Study Finance' from the 1th to 14th of next month, set notification 15 minutes before, then search and display this event.

name: citymapper_london_oxford_walk
task: Open Citymapper and search route from London Bridge to Oxford Street.How long is the estimated walking time?.

name: citymapper_bus100_route
task: Search Bus 100 route from St Paul's Station in Citymapper, view stops and live departure times.

name: citymapper_train_heathrow
task: Find route from King’s Cross to Heathrow Airport via train, save the first route.

name: citymapper_kingscross_hydepark
task: Search route from King’s Cross to Hyde Park, enter the fastest suggested route.

name: citymapper_home_work_bike_fast
task: Set '221B Baker Street' as Home and 'Canary Wharf' as Work, and choose bike navigation with fast mode.

name: joytify_shape_of_you
task: Open Joytify, search 'Shape of You' by Ed Sheeran, and add it to Favorite Songs.

name: joytify_top_charts_first_artist
task: Open the song ranked first in Joytify Top Charts and navigate to the artist's homepage.

name: joytify_believe_album_playlist
task: Search 'Believe' album by Justin Bieber, and save to playlist.

name: joytify_chill_vibes_playlist
task: Create a new playlist 'Chill Vibes' in Joytify.

name: joytify_midnight_lullabies_repeat
task: Play first song in 'Midnight Lullabies' playlist and set to repeat single mode.

name: joplin_view_grocery_list
task: Open Joplin and view note 'Grocery List'.What is its content?

name: joplin_temp_note_delete
task: Create a new note 'Temporary Note' in Joplin, then delete it.

name: joplin_work_projects_plan
task: Create notebook 'Work Projects', inside it create note 'Project Plan' with content 'Define milestones and deadlines'.

name: joplin_italy_trip_itinerary
task: Create a notebook 'Travel' in Joplin. Then create another notebook 'Italy Trip' and set its parent notebook as 'Travel'. Within 'Italy Trip', create a note 'Rome Itinerary'.

name: joplin_reading_notes_tag
task: Create note 'Reading Notes' and tag it 'Study'.

name: file_copy_testtxt
task: Open system File app, copy 'test.txt' from 'Downloads' to 'Documents' folder.

name: file_check_modified_date
task: From 'Downloads' folder in File app, check the modified date of 'test.txt' and provide the answer.

name: file_open_epub
task: Open 'The color of law.epub' in the File app.

name: file_delete_todelete
task: Delete 'to_delete.txt' in 'Documents' folder in File app.

name: file_create_mypng_folder
task: Create folder 'MyPNG' in 'Documents', then copy 'pic1.png' from Downloads to 'MyPNG'.

name: gmail_check_latest_email
task: In Gmail, check the latest email from 'stock_notify_01@163.com', including spam folder. Provide subject and summary.

name: gmail_write_email
task: Open Gmail and send an email to 'stock_notify_01@163.com' with subject 'Meeting time' and body 'When is the meeting?'

name: gmail_star_latest_email
task: Star the latest email from 'stock_notify_01@163.com' in Gmail.

name: gmail_latest_email_time
task: Answer with the received time of the latest email from 'stock_notify_01@163.com' in Gmail.

name: gmail_search_meeting_summary
task: Search 'meeting' in Gmail, select latest email from 'stock_notify_01@163.com', and provide summary.

name: eboox_open_lost_world
task: Open 'The Lost World' in eboox library.

name: eboox_add_poor_charlie
task: In eboox, add 'Poor Charlie’s Almanack' from local 'Documents' folder.

name: eboox_econ_shelf
task: Create shelf 'Econ' in eboox and add 'Principles of Economics' to it.

name: eboox_add_local_shelf
task: Add shelf linked to local folder '/Documents/Books/' containing 'The intelligent investor' and 'Quantitative Trading'.

name: eboox_delete_temp_shelf
task: Delete shelf 'Temp' in eboox without deleting books in it.

name: youtube_search_love_story
task: Search 'Love Story' by Taylor Swift in YouTube and play the official MV.

name: youtube_latest_subscriber
task: Provide the name of the YouTuber who posted the latest video in the Subscriptions tab.

name: youtube_gordon_ramsay
task: Search 'How to cook steak', play video by 'Hodder Books' titled 'Gordon Ramsay’s Ultimate Cookery Course'.

name: youtube_shorts_superman
task: In YouTube Shorts tab, search 'Superman' and filter by shorts. Then play the first video

name: youtube_video_quality
task: Go to YouTube settings, select video quality preferences, and choose 'higher picture quality' for WIFI.

name: homeworkout_change_rest
task: In Home Workout settings, change training rest time to 30 seconds.

name: homeworkout_abs_beginner
task: Open Home Workout, search Abs workouts, select 'abs beginner', and start training.

name: homeworkout_check_weight
task: Go to the Report tab in Home Workout and tell me my current weight.

name: homeworkout_leg_nojump
task: In discovery tab, find 'leg workout (no jumping)' for beginners and count exercises included.

name: homeworkout_bmi_health
task: Check Home Workout Report tab for BMI and determine if weight is healthy. Tell me the BMI and healthy status

name: pinterest_marvel_author
task: Search 'marvel comics' in Pinterest. Who is the author of the first pin?

name: pinterest_download_car
task: In Pinterest, download the first image from search results of 'cars'.

name: pinterest_cyberpunk_likes
task: How many likes does the first result of 'Cyberpunk' have in Pinterest?

name: pinterest_share_homepage
task: From Pinterest homepage, select first recommendation and share via Chrome.

name: pinterest_superman_video
task: Search 'superman' in Pinterest, filter videos only, select first result, and view full text content.

name: chrome_open_arxiv
task: Open 'www.arxiv.org' in Chrome.

name: chrome_search_ny_rent
task: Search 'New York renting' in Chrome, avoid sponsored results, and find and go to streeteasy.com.

name: chrome_scene_wallpaper
task: Search for scene wallpaper images in Chrome and download the first result.

name: chrome_developer_download
task: Open 'https://developer.android.com' in Chrome and find text 'Download' on the page.

name: chrome_incognito_cookies
task: Create new incognito tab in Chrome and turn off 'block third-party cookies'.

name: wikipedia_isaac_newton
task: Search 'Isaac Newton' in Wikipedia. When was he born?

name: wikipedia_tony_stark
task: Open Wikipedia and start reading 'Tony Stark' in saved articles.

name: wikipedia_add_tom_cruise
task: Create list 'actress' in Wikipedia saved tab, search Emma Watson, and add the article to the list.

name: wikipedia_quantum_algorithms
task: Search 'Quantum Computing', select first article, open table of contents, and go to Algorithms chapter.

name: wikipedia_settings_download
task: Go to Wikipedia settings and turn off 'Download reading list articles'.

name: weather_add_delete_locations
task: Add London and remove Paris from location list in Weather Forecast.

name: weather_hk_highest_temp
task: Check and tell me the highest temperature in Hong Kong today in Weather Forecast.

name: weather_change_units
task: Change unit to Fahrenheit and wind speed to mi/h in Weather Forecast.

name: weather_singapore_forecast
task: Add Berlin to Weather Forecast, check 30-day tab, is it raining tomorrow? What is lowest temperature tomorrow?

name: weather_bad_weather_alert
task: Turn on Bad Weather Warning in Weather Forecast.

name: supercook_add_pepper
task: Add pepper to shopping list in Supercook app.

name: supercook_select_onion
task: In pantry tab, select onion and check recipes that can be cooked.

name: supercook_walnut_pancakes
task: Add walnut in pantry, go to menu tab, search pancake recipes, and count types of pancakes possible.

name: supercook_deselect_eggs_milk
task: Deselect egg and milk in pantry, then add them to shopping list.

name: supercook_butter_recipes
task: Remove butter from shopping list, mark as pantry ingredient, and tell me how many recipes can be made.
